arts.ttl: Rodgers explains Celtic starting XI choice, will 'decide what the game needs'
arts.sum: Celtic boss Brendan Rodgers has went for selection continuity.

arts.ttl: Celtic starting XI vs Dundee United draws fan attention as Brendan Rodgers names his side
arts.sum: Celtic starting XI: SCHMEICHEL, JOHNSTON, CCV, TRUSTY, TAYLOR, MCGREGOR, ENGELS, MCCOWAN, KUHN, MAEDA, IDAH. Rodgers has named Celtic starting XI vs Dundee Utd

arts.ttl: Celtic transfer update as Welsh set for loan as Rodgers explains 'easy transition'
arts.sum: Stephen Welsh could leave Celtic on loan this month with Brendan Rodgers confirming interest in the centre-back.

arts.ttl: Dundee United star admits Celtic will be 'difficult' to thwart under Brendan Rodgers
arts.sum: Speaking to The Courier, Dundee United forward Van der Sande admitted Celtic Park is a destination other Scottish Premiership clubs are ‘not likely’ to claim points from. Kick-off is fast approaching as Celtic take on Dundee United in the Scottish Premiership tonight with three important points at stake in Glasgow’s east end.

arts.ttl: Celtic vs Dundee United LIVE as Greg Taylor starts with Rodgers making stick or twist call
arts.sum: It's another huge night of top flight action with the champions in action against the men from Tayside

arts.ttl: Auston Trusty shines light on Brendan Rodgers' key role in emphatic Celtic reaction after Ibrox defeat
arts.sum: The Bhoys have recorded only one domestic loss under Brendan Rodgers as their impressive run of form has carried them to a 13-point lead at the top of the Scottish Premiership . Auston Trusty on how Brendan Rodgers inspires Celtic mindset

arts.ttl: Nicolas Kuhn's remarkable record at Celtic as key metric shows how he outstrips Jota
arts.sum: Nicolas Kuhn and Jota’s best Celtic goal Nicolas Kuhn’s stats show Celtic hero’s impact at the club vs Jota

arts.ttl: Michael Stewart shares if he thinks Rangers boss Philippe Clement can close the gap to Celtic
arts.sum: When Celtic won the league and the Bhoys beat Rangers in the Scottish Cup final last season, the talk about the gap between both clubs dominated the headlines. But after the last two Glasgow Derby games where Rangers actually pushed Celtic but still, ultimately lost the most important game in the League Cup final, the conversation on the gap between the two clubs has resurfaced.

arts.ttl: Kris Boyd brands Celtic fans 'spoiled' but isn't buying one thing over Kieran Tierney fan chant gripe
arts.sum: The fallout from Rodgers swipe at the fans is rumbling on

arts.ttl: Celtic told no manager in Scotland has earned the right to do what Brendan Rodgers has just done
arts.sum: Look, if Celtic weren’t winning games or trophies, then you question if Rodgers would even dare come out and be so critical. “I think Brendan has come out, spoken with passion and he is frustrated,” said Bartley.
